summary: The diff implements most of the required features across backend (Motoko actor) and frontend (React components). All major pages, components, and backend types appear to be present. However, several specific acceptance criteria cannot be confirmed from the truncated/omitted files, and a few requirements have partial or unclear implementation. Key gaps include: the Login Page with role selector and MFA badge (REQ-2) is not visible in the diff (LoginPage.tsx was omitted), the images (logo and hero background) are not present, and several page-level implementations (Dashboard, Reports, AdminConfig, Approvals, RequestDetail, CreateRequest pages) were omitted from the diff summary, making it impossible to confirm their full compliance. The backend Motoko file is truncated and uses a non-standard structure with imports that may violate the single-actor constraint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Enterprise application logo mark image (accessflow-logo.dim_128x128.png) must be present
missing_requirements.reason: No image files are listed in the diff. The required logo asset is not added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Abstract hero background image for login page (login-bg.dim_1440x900.png) must be present
missing_requirements.reason: No image files are listed in the diff. The required hero background asset is not added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Login Page with company-branded sign-in form (email + password), Internet Identity login button, MFA indicator badge, and role selector (Employee, Manager, IT Admin, Finance Admin)
missing_requirements.reason: LoginPage.tsx was omitted from the diff summary. Cannot confirm implementation of email/password fields, role selector, MFA badge, or Internet Identity button.

missing_requirements.requirement: All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo with all four data types as stable variables
missing_requirements.reason: The backend imports external modules (AccessControl, UserApproval, MixinAuthorization) which may violate the single-actor constraint. The file is truncated so full stable variable definitions for all four types cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dashboard page with KPI cards, recent requests table, donut chart, bar chart, role-specific actions
missing_requirements.reason: DashboardPage.tsx was omitted from the diff summary. Cannot confirm implementation of any dashboard acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create Request page with 3-step wizard, AI Pre-Submission Analysis, backend submission, and redirect to detail page
missing_requirements.reason: CreateRequestPage.tsx was omitted from the diff summary. While AIAnalysisPanel.tsx exists, the full wizard page implementation cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Request Detail Page with full metadata, approval chain timeline, status stepper, SLA countdown, AI risk flags, and audit log feed
missing_requirements.reason: RequestDetailPage.tsx was omitted from the diff summary. Supporting components exist but the full page assembly cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Approvals Screen with pending requests list filtered by approver role, risk badges, approve/reject buttons, auto-approval logic, and audit log on action
missing_requirements.reason: ApprovalsPage.tsx was omitted from the diff summary. ApprovalActionButtons.tsx exists but the full page with filtering and auto-approval logic cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Reports and Export page with filter bar, line/pie/bar charts, CSV export, PDF print view, department breakdown table, and audit trail with search and pagination
missing_requirements.reason: ReportsPage.tsx was omitted from the diff summary. Cannot confirm any of the acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin Configuration page with four tabs: User Management, SLA Rules, Approval Chain Policies, System Notifications
missing_requirements.reason: AdminConfigPage.tsx was omitted from the diff summary. Individual tab components exist but the assembled page with four tabs cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal — a modal dialog prompting new users to enter their name and department on first login
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a profile setup modal flow for new users. This is an additional feature not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: UserApproval module with requestApproval/setApproval/listApprovals functions and a separate user approval onboarding workflow in the backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies CRUD for Users, Requests, AuditLogs, and Notifications only. A separate user approval/onboarding workflow with ApprovalStatus types is not part of the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: MixinAuthorization pattern with external module imports (AccessControl, UserApproval) in the Motoko backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec requires all backend logic in a single Motoko actor. Importing separate AccessControl and MixinAuthorization modules is an architectural addition not requested.
